command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import sys, json
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert(0, 'runtime')
from agent_identity_loader import load_agent
from perspective_engine import select_template, render_content, journal_threshold_met

repo_root = Path('.')
results = []

sakura   = load_agent('sakura',   repo_root=repo_root)
remy     = load_agent('remy',     repo_root=repo_root)
megabyte = load_agent('megabyte', repo_root=repo_root)
larry    = load_agent('larry',    repo_root=repo_root)
sentinel = load_agent('sentinel', repo_root=repo_root)

tunnel_event = {
    'schema_version':'1.0','event_id':'se-test-i-tunnel',
    'event_type':'tunnel_down','source_type':'environment','severity':'high',
    'ecosystem_time':'2026-06-17T03:00:00+00:00',
    'subject':{'type':'tunnel','name':'remy.cutegrafiks.com','target':'192.168.0.199:8788'},
    'detail':{'outage_duration_seconds':720,'outage_started':'2026-06-17T03:00:00+00:00',
              'outage_resolved':'2026-06-17T03:12:00+00:00','actor':'megabyte'},
    'awareness_scope':['megabyte','remy','sentinel'],'broadcast':False,
}
def T(label, cond, note=''):
    results.append(('PASS' if cond else 'FAIL') + ' ' + label + (': ' + note if note else ''))

t=select_template(tunnel_event, sentinel, None)
T('I1', t=='governance_record', f'template={t}')

t=select_template(tunnel_event, remy, None, agent_presence_at_event={'presence_tier':'offline'})
T('I2', t=='indirect_observer', f'template={t}')

t=select_template(tunnel_event, megabyte, None)
T('I3', t=='primary_actor', f'template={t}')

larry_bcast=dict(tunnel_event, broadcast=True, awareness_scope=['megabyte','remy','sentinel','larry'])
t=select_template(larry_bcast, larry, None)
T('I4', t=='commerce_observer', f'template={t}')

c=render_content(tunnel_event, megabyte, 'primary_actor', None, repo_root)
T('I5', 'remy.cutegrafiks.com' in c, c[:80])

c_mega=render_content(tunnel_event, megabyte, 'primary_actor', None, repo_root)
c_sent=render_content(tunnel_event, sentinel, 'governance_record', None, repo_root)
T('I6', 'remy.cutegrafiks.com' in c_mega and 'remy.cutegrafiks.com' in c_sent)

contents={}
for name,identity in [('megabyte',megabyte),('remy',remy),('sentinel',sentinel)]:
    if name in tunnel_event['awareness_scope']:
        pres={'presence_tier':'offline'} if name=='remy' else None
        tmpl=select_template(tunnel_event, identity, None, pres)
        contents[name]=render_content(tunnel_event, identity, tmpl, None, repo_root)
T('I7', all(len(c)>10 for c in contents.values()))

T('I9', contents.get('megabyte') != contents.get('remy'), 'different perspectives')

crit=dict(tunnel_event, severity='critical')
T('I10', journal_threshold_met(crit, megabyte, 'primary_actor'))

info=dict(tunnel_event, severity='info')
T('I11', not journal_threshold_met(info, megabyte, 'direct_witness'))

gap_event={
    'schema_version':'1.0','event_id':'se-test-gap-remy',
    'event_type':'agent_gap_report','source_type':'environment','severity':'high',
    'ecosystem_time':'2026-06-17T09:00:00+00:00',
    'subject':{'type':'agent','name':'remy'},
    'detail':{'gap_duration_human':'9h 2m','events_during_gap_count':1,'actor':'remy'},
    'awareness_scope':['remy','sakura','sentinel'],'broadcast':False,
}
T('I12', journal_threshold_met(gap_event, remy, 'gap_returnee'))

print()
for r in results: print(r)
passed=sum(1 for r in results if r.startswith('PASS'))
failed=sum(1 for r in results if r.startswith('FAIL'))
print(f'\nGROUP I: {passed}/{len(results)} passed, {failed} failed')
if failed==0: print('PERSPECTIVE GATE: PASSED')
"
